CustomField.formula: not(or( begins(Phone ,'050-41'), begins( Phone,'052-71'), begins( Phone,'052-76'), begins( Phone,'054-84'), begins( Phone,'054-85'), begins( Phone,'053-31'), begins( Phone,'053-41'), begins( Phone,'058-32'), begins( Phone,'055-67'), begins( Phone,'055-32'), begins( Phone,'05041'), begins( Phone,'05271'), begins( Phone,'05276'), begins( Phone,'05484'), begins( Phone,'05485'), begins( Phone,'05331'), begins( Phone,'05341'), begins( Phone,'05832'), begins( Phone,'05567'), begins( Phone,'05532')))
CustomField.label: Number Not Kosher
